rules: if Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 21 cool
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 then Living Room AC off
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room AC off
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room AC off
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature > 32.5 OR Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature < 21.9 OR Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
